entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @graziela  Could you please provide an update on when the IRS Publication 1494 for tax year 2025 Snote will be released to customers?

entry.title: Business Builders: Sustainable Investments
entry.content:
Teach your students to elucidate captivating data-driven stories using visualization techniques to extract insights from business information with HEC Montreal's new gamified experience developed in partnership with SAP.

Business Builders gives educators the opportunity to prepare future leaders for an increasingly complex and data-driven world. Business Builders enables learning data storytelling and visualization with SAP Analytics Cloud.

Business Builders is FREE for the academic community.

The Sustainability Portfolio Scenario assesses a stock portfolio's alignment with ESG goals using CSA. It identifies stocks to remove and add based on their sustainability performance, ensuring the rebuilt portfolio aligns with the updated ESG strategy.

Register at Business Builders: Sustainable Investments Tickets, Tue, Dec 10, 2024 at 1:00 PM | Eventbrite and mark your calendars and save the date for this webinar!

entry.title: Re: Datasphere CLI - Create Object with --input and node.js
entry.content:
@Björn_K, your code is almost correct. If you want to directly in js code insert CSN definition - then first create a constant like:

const TableCSN = {
	definitions: {
		T3: {
			kind: "entity",
			"@EndUserText.label": "T3",
			"@ObjectModel.modelingPattern": {
				"#": "DATA_STRUCTURE",
			},
			"@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities": [
				{
					"#": "DATA_STRUCTURE",
				},
			],
			elements: {
				ID: {
					"@EndUserText.label": "ID",
					type: "cds.String",
					length: 100,
					key: true,
					notNull: true,
				},
				Name: {
					"@EndUserText.label": "Name",
					type: "cds.String",
					length: 100,
				},
			},
		},
	},
};

 then change input to:

"--input": JSON.stringify(TableCSN),

That worked for me.

One more thing - you are using passcode for login and in your case it is empty  - I guess it is empty just for the post purpose, as in reality it is to be populated. Anyway  please make sure you are really logged in, e.g. but executing in terminal:

datasphere spaces list --host <HOST_NAME>

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud SDK: How to setup requests using the busine...
entry.content:
Thanks for pointing me to the right direction, it worked!

In case anyone else is interested:
I used @SAP-cloud-sdk/connectivity to retrieve the JWT (with the function retriveJwt), see https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/js/features/connectivity/destinations.

Just provide the request as parameter to that function [let retrievedJwt = retriveJwt(request)] and you should get the JWT, which you then can pass on to the execute request of the API (providing both the destination name and the jwt). This way the call is getting made with the business user logged on in the frontend application. You also need to make sure that you have a communication arrangement for the given API.

entry.title: Excel Add-in SSO login issue with script error
entry.content:
Hello,

We have implemented MFA for our ByDesign system and the SSO login works fine with Test system for browser and excel add-in. For production system works fine with browser but excel add-in throws script error. 

We reached SAP via incident and it seems the browser setting needs to be changed and to work with our internal IT but we need to know which setting need to be changed. 

Also it works fine with our personal machine. Does anybody can help or faced this kind of problem ?

 

Thanks, 

Madhan

entry.title: Re: Steps to navigate to a canvas/custom page in List Report application
entry.content:
@PoojaPrakashAgr @motiononme1 @15praveenchandrasekar 

In Component.js file of flightcrud.comp2, add the init function as shown below. 

 

 

 

init: function() {
                ReuseComponentSupport.mixInto(this, "component");
                (UIComponent.prototype.init || jQuery.noop).apply(this, arguments);
            }

 

 

 

 Reference links:

  • Developing Reuse Components 

  • sap.suite.ui.generic.template.extensionAPI.ReuseComponentSupport.mixInto

entry.title: Re: Juridiction code Issue
entry.content:
Hi 

several jurisdiction codes have been determined from the address. In NO_DIALOG mode however, a jurisdiction code cannot be selected from a dialog box.

You need to maintain table t001c with below data :

ARBGB = TAX_TXJCD

MSGNR = 100

UNAME = space / your user name 

MSGTS = W

MSGTB = W 

Once you do this , message will be suppressed and tax jurisdiction code will be populated.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Continuous Influence - Results of 11/2024 Review Cycle
entry.content:
SAP Commerce Cloud has completed the fourth review of Improvement Requests since opening the SAP Continuous Influence sessions in Q4, 2022. To date, we have received 217 Improvement Requests and more than 1000 votes across all session. We highly appreciate the active participation from customers and partners who contribute. Your requests, detailed description of use cases, and votes gives us an unique opportunity to connect with you at scale and use your input to prioritise and scope deliverables.

We have evaluated the top voted requests and also some requests with lower votes that we frequently hear through other feedback channels, such as Customer Technology Advisory Boards (CTABs), customer user groups, customer co-innovation, partner feedback and interactions with colleagues in the field, to mention just a few.

In this CIS Review Cycle we have updated 28 Improvement Requests, as follows: 

    • 7 have been delivered and 6 were already offered
    • 6 have been moved forward in the product planning process with 3 accepted and 3 planned long-term
    • 3 have been updated with for long-term consideration, meaning they have not (yet) made it into product planning
    • 7 have been updated with not planned

In the tables below you can find an overview of the delivered and accepted Improvement Requests:

Delivered

Session

IR #

IR Title

Status

SAP Commerce Cloud Automation298242Environment specific URLs in Cloud logging System(CLS)Delivered in Q3/2024
SAP Commerce Cloud Automation300080Dynatrace - Webhook / E-Mail NotificationDelivered in Q3/2024
SAP Commerce Cloud Automation292949Dynatrace customer-specific alert policiesDelivered in Q4/2024
SAP Commerce Cloud Automation299103Extendes Dynatrace Metric & Anomaly Detection needed for SNAT Port UsageDelivered in Q4/2024
SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Experience299939Support for JUnit 5Delivered in Q3/2024
SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Experience299630Improve Handling of RedirectsDelivered in Q4/2024
SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Experience299621Enhance Spartacus cx-media Component to support srcset based imagesDelivered in Q4/2024

Accepted

Session

IR #

IR Title

Status

SAP Commerce Cloud Business Features290282Add on product level min/max order qtyPlanned for Q1/2025*
SAP Commerce Cloud Pre-built Integrations326402Consider the store session language while sending the price request to the CPS Pricing ServicePlanned for Q1/2025*
SAP Commerce Cloud Automation325810Add Scaling control capacity in SAP Commerce Cloud APIPlanned for Q1/2025*

* SAP does not commit to deliver any planned functionality. Plans are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice.

In the table below you find a list with links to the four Continuous Influence Sessions for SAP Commerce Cloud as well as to the results blogs for the full overview of Improvement Requests which have been updated in this review cycle:

Session Name & LinkDescriptionResults Blog (per session, w/ the same content)
SAP Commerce Cloud AutomationFor technical users operating SAP Commerce Cloud instanceshttps://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3587 
SAP Commerce Cloud Developer ExperienceFor technical users customising SAP Commerce Cloudhttps://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3590
SAP Commerce Cloud Pre-built IntegrationsFor technical users integrating SAP Commerce Cloud with other SAP solutionshttps://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3589 
SAP Commerce Cloud Business FeaturesFor business (and technical) users with requests related to business capabilities of SAP Commerce Cloud https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3588 


For results from previous CIS Review Cycles for SAP Commerce Cloud Continuous Influence you can check out the following blog posts:

    • Results of 06/2024 Review Cycle
    • Results of 11/2023 Review Cycle
    • Results of 06/2023 Review Cycle

Please see this blog post if you have not yet registered for and accessed the SAP Commerce Cloud Influence Sessions and would like to learn more.

We look forward to hearing more from and from more of you in the future!

entry.title: Re: How to configure ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud

entry.title: i cant choose the space and organisation and how can i delete some builds
Manage mass maintanance - uploaded excel
entry.content:
Hi all,

last year we run mass maintenance through app Manage Mass Maintenance - Products.

Job was successful, but i would like to ask if it is possible to download or get excel which was uploaded in.

I tried to check this process, but i see nowhere possibility to download this excel.

Thank you for your advices,

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report - Database Connector error
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply.
I use CR16 (SP8)  on windows10 and I have no problems
The problem is on 2 pc with Windows 11 of our customers and

the strange thing is that on many other PCs with Windows 11, we do not encounter problems

I use OleDB driver for MSSql on report. 
Can you tell me where I can download the redist pack for windows11?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CICD pileplie for SAP JAVA
entry.content: Please check following official SAP documentation:: Consume Azure Services in SAP BTP

entry.title: Issue with Unrestricted Stock Popup in Adaptation Editor for App "Manage Stock" (F106, F1062) in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am encountering an issue with the "Manage Stock" application (F106, F1062) when using the Adaptation Editor in SAP Business Application Studio (SAP BAS).

The issue is as follows:

When I open the application via the Adaptation Editor in SAP BAS, the Unrestricted Stock Popup (refer to the attached screenshot) does not open. Hence, I cannot access the controls to make modifications.


However, when I open the same application directly from the Fiori Launchpad, the popup works perfectly, and I am able to interact with it as expected.

 


I have ensured the following:

The app works fine in the Launchpad.
There are no apparent errors in the browser console or network logs in SAP BAS.
All necessary roles and authorizations are in place.
Could anyone provide insights into why this issue might occur specifically in the Adaptation Editor and how to resolve it?

 

#Sapfiori #BASAdaptationProject #Logistics #ManageStock

entry.title: Re: CIM not able to determine Invoicing Party (Central Invoice Management)
entry.content: Hi everyone, I face the same problem as fathd. The supplier list is not refreshing even after doing a full import again. Any ideas?

entry.title: How to trigger email notification when Benefits End Date is changed?
entry.content: Is there a way for us to trigger an email notification or alert when the Benefits End Date of a terminated employee is changed? PS. The recipients of this email/alert are active employees.

entry.title: R visualization console shows PCRE JIT compilation errors claiming no more memory
entry.content:
Hi!

I have hosted Rserve on a Google Cloud VM instance with CentOS system. I have connected it to SAP Analytics Cloud successfully (TLS and all working), but I keep getting errors when trying to work with R visualizations.

The errors I tend to get are as follows:


Warning in grep("^[[:alpha:]]{2}_", x[1L], perl = TRUE) :PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

Warning in FUN(X[[i]], ...) : PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

Warning in strsplit(x, " [ ]* ", perl = TRUE) : PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

I have tried debugging this by also just disabling PCRE JIT compiler in Renviron but it didn't seem to work. I have found very little information on this error, basically nothing from Rstudio community or R documentation. I have noticed that more than a decade ago this error was prevalent in some php systems but nothing on R or SAC. I did also increase memory allocations/limits for Rserve but didn't seem to be the cause of this error.

entry.title: SAC - Measure Column Script in onActive Function
entry.content:
Hi, 

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud.

I created a measure column in the story (counting a dimension). I want to filter my table using this measure column but I want to do it in the script.

We can filter the dimension column by writing: Top_Table.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Dimension_Column_Name",{value: "XX"}):;

Can we filter the measure column in script?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: move bank account to new company code
entry.content: I found the solution by experimenting. We had to close bank account in old company, then update configuration for the bank account and it got opened in new company. we manually transfer opening balance from old company to new company using intercompany clearing accounts

entry.title: Re: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know
entry.content:
Dear Monika,

talking about S/4HANA public edition: for both versions you've mentioned,

  • integrated via CIM or
  • mass upload (directly in S/4 public without CIM?),

it is necessary to license SAP DRC, cloud edition, right?

Thanks & regards

Wolfgang

entry.title: Extension while delivery creation to change item weights and dimensions before route determination
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are using S/4HANA and have to change weights and dimensions for our configured products on item level while creating deliveries. As different weights may impact route determination, we cannot use most common user exits (Include MV50AFZ1 or BAdI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC) because route has already been determinated when processing them.

Therefore we need an extension where to change item data BEFORE route is determined.

Can anyone help?

Kind regards
Peter Schmidt

entry.title: Re: Adobe form XML parsing error due to invalid characters
entry.content: Big thanks for the post, very helpful!

entry.title: Tax recorded in entity where the vendor is not where the expense is.
entry.content:
we have a situation where we use one company and the bank account to pay vendors so all the invoices are recorded to this company with vendor in that company as well. however the debit is coded to the company it is for, in this case, the tax calculated is recorded in the company where the vendor is whereas we want it to be recorded where the expense is so is there a configuration to achieve that or another way to reclass the taxes.

 

Current situation entries are like below

Cocode1 Vendor  Credit
Cocode1 Tax        debit
Cocode1 Interco   Debit

Cocode2  Expense Debit
CoCode2  Interco   Credit


What we will like is the tax line to be in the Cocode2

entry.title: Standard change RFC auto status update once standard change moved to import into production state
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have implemented standard change in our CHARM and solman version is 7.2 sp 9. 

At the being implemented state of request for change standard change is getting created, Now we want a configuration that will mark parent request for change to confirmed state when a standard change is moved to imported into production state. Our standard change transaction type is ZMSG and RFC transaction type is YZCR.

 

 

 

Regards,

Saikat

#SOLMAN Change Control Management   @Richard_Büffing

entry.title: Re: Is FSCM available in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, it's also supported.

Please check link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/811174d486d74c709469ef3d36f9b7bb.html

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
tried both ways, select query fetch from CDS1 and join CDS2 and vice versa.

as below:

Define view ZCDS1
as select distinct from mard
{
key matnr,
key werks,
key lgort,
labst
}

Define view ZCDS2

as select from ZCDS1

{
key matnr,
sum(labst) as stock
} group by matnr

Program:
From previous fetch, we have combination of matnr,werks stored in ITAB. 

s_lgort selection screen.

select ZCDS1~matnr
          ZCDS2~stock
from ZCDS1
inner join ZCDS2 on ZCDS2~matnr = ZCDS1~matnr
for all entries in @ITAB where ZCDS1~matnr = @ITAB-matnr
                                         and ZCDS1~werks = @ITAB-WERKS
                                         and ZCDS1~lgort in @s_lgort
into table @DATA(lt_stock).

entry.title: CDS view: Default value in selection screen field with excluding value
entry.content:
Developed Fiori Element based App with selection screen field as Status. I need to populate default value in selection with NE 'X'.

I tited  @Consumption.filter :{ multipleSelections: true, selectionType: #RANGE, defaultValue: 'X' } which is having only Equal option.

Please suggest. Thanks for your time

entry.title: Re: Form data option not working in SAP CPI but working in POSTMAN - 404 Error
entry.content: Yes, it is working for other create and update on JIRA. So, I am passing the token and authentication wise it is fine.

entry.title: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
Hello,

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud. I have tables, numeric cards, line graphs on different pages in my story. In order to use my Month filter actively on every page and chart, I created a Calendar Model that I can link to all tables. So there are months in it and I linked it with the month column of each table. In short, I linked my Calendar Dimension to other FACT tables.

I created a common Page Filter that I can filter on each page. So when I select a month, I see the data of that month on each page. However, I want to do the following: Show 2 years of data outside of Numeric Cards, but show selected data on all numeric cards.

I guess I can summarize it like this: Is there an option to turn off a chart to filters so that the filters don't affect it? Line charts should not be affected by the selected global month filter.

Thank you

entry.title: Material Part number enhancement
entry.content:
Hi Team

Could you let us know the feasibility of adding MATERIAL PART NUMBER field/column to SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST app and in the Backend transaction MIRO?

In the Supplier Invoices List App, under the Purchase Document Reference tab, the requirement is to add a new column for the Manufacturer Part Number next to the Material Number (MATNR). This column should display the MFRPN (Manufacturer Part Number) corresponding to each Material Number. The Part Number fetched from MARA table, where the MATNR is matched with the appropriate MFRPN field. 

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Re: Early lot creation by product
entry.content: I cannot read where this was mentioned. Could you please repeat it?

entry.title: DTR- Default Route is not triggered in FU
entry.content:
Hi

In the outbound delivery, the route is automatically determined, but after saving the outbound delivery, the system generates the Freight Unit (FU) document. However, when I open the "Edit Freight Unit" app, the route is not displayed. It showing empty is Default Route field.

Regards,

Kumar

entry.title: Manage Withholding Tax Items app is not found
entry.content:
Manage Withholding Tax Items app (App ID F5428) is not found event the business catalog and business role is assigned

I need to use Manage Withholding Tax Items app, so I have assigned the business catalog SAP_FIN_BC_MWTI_COMMON_PC to role for user.

After I have done managing the business catalog and business role, I still cannot see the app. Please help to investigate.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Manage Withholding Tax Items app is not found
entry.content:
The app Manage Withholding Tax Items is not a standalone application and doesn't have a separate tile, so it won't appear in search results, and this is standard behavior. It is accessible from the app Run Statutory Reports.

See kba 3503880 No app Manage Withholding Tax Items in search result

entry.title: Re: The Procurement Monthly - December 2024
entry.content: Thanks again @GordonDonovan

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content:
just redefine it in your z segw project.

this should help you.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-redefine-rds-based-odata-services/ba-p/13527155

entry.title: Any object to change prices of shipping costs? (ie a BAPI for VI02)
entry.content:
It seems we are a lot different of almost every company in this world (and some of the others) and we cannot use the automatic calculation of shipping costs.

So, I need to create the cost with each subitem's conditions customized.

I've been looking around (and in other places) for things like "BAPI VI01" "FM VI02" "shipping cost change" and any other query string that I've been able to think of with no success.

The most nearly approach I found is a post here with a lot of calls to SD_SCD* function modules, and it seems even more complicated than the batch input I have in mind (in which I must control different tabs, stripes, positions without positioning buttons, etc).

Has anyone found a better approach?
(and no, to win the lottery and leave my position is not an option)

entry.title: Re: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various app...
entry.content: Hello HakanHaslaman thanks for your response If I have made sure that the names of the clients are completely identical, I have also made sure that for each client the scope is reflected. As a comment, if you test each client individually everything works perfectly, however, when I add more than one client in grant-as-authority-to-apps this does not work and returns a 401 unauthorized for each referenced client. The last part you mention causes me a little doubt, in the blog I base they never comment that the clients' uaa must be linked to my application and/or srv This must be necessary, that it be bound to both the app and the srv?

entry.title: Can time pairs be split across midnight in SuccessFactors Time?
entry.content:
We have employees that start a shift on one day and work through to the next day. Our current time system allows us to split the time pairs so that employees are credited for the hours worked on the actual calendar day. This is mainly important for the end of the pay week and for calculating hours worked on holidays for holiday premium pay. 

Scenario: Punch In - 12/9/2024 10:00PM  Punch Out 12/10/2024 6:00AM

Our current system will credit the employee for two hours on 12/9/2024 and 6 hours on 12/10/2024.

Is this possible using SuccessFactors Time?

entry.title: Re: How to configure ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud
entry.content:
Hi @harish_dahima,

no, this is currently not possible.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Meets TypeScript: A Smooth Migration Journey with Joule
entry.content:
@martinhaeuser 
Thank you for your response.
I am basically convinced that it can be very helpful.
I can understand that you get the information from the yaml file, but if I create a freestyle app with the Fiori tools (as I have done here), this information is not in the yaml by default, but comes from the manifest.json.
This is not a special way at all, but should definitely be taken into account.
Thank you for your work!
Marian

entry.title: SAP Retail : Merchandise & Article Hierarchies Key Points to consider
entry.content:
SAP Retail: Merchandise Hierarchy vs. Article Hierarchy

In the SAP Retail solution, two key hierarchies exist: Merchandise Hierarchy and Article Hierarchy. Each serves distinct purposes, but confusion often arises during implementation when their roles are not clearly defined. This can lead to redundancy or over-complication in hierarchies, hampering efficiency.

  1. Merchandise Hierarchy

Purpose:

Focused on internal processes, the Merchandise Hierarchy organizes goods for procurement, pricing, and inventory management. It aligns with the merchant’s perspective to manage purchasing, vendor interactions, and promotions.

Key Features:

  • Articles are grouped by shared characteristics, e.g., Apparel → Men's Apparel → Dress Shirt → Slim Fit.
  • Attributes such as color, size, and brand are maintained at the article master level.
  • Articles are assigned to one node at the lowest level of the hierarchy.
  • Useful for:
    • Condition records and mass maintenance.
    • Procurement-focused planning and analytics.
    • Defining assortments and streamlining listing processes.

Best Practices:

  • Use GS1 standards (e.g., Segment → Family → Class → Brick → Attribute).
  • Avoid creating overly complex hierarchies to fit both procurement and sales needs.
  1. Article Hierarchy

Purpose:

Customer-focused, the Article Hierarchy reflects how consumers make purchasing decisions, often modeled as a Consumer Decision Tree (CDT).

Key Features:

  • Articles can belong to multiple hierarchies, with time-dependent structures.
  • Designed for sales analytics, profitability analysis, and retail planning.
  • Example: Men's Dress Shirt → Slim Fit → No Iron → White → Size (matching consumer search behavior).

Best Practices:

  • Maintain the hierarchy at the client level to standardize across distribution chains.
  • Limit to 5-6 levels to prevent performance issues.
  • Avoid frequent changes to maintain historical data integrity for reporting.

Practical Example

For a Shirt, the Merchandise Hierarchy might classify it as:
Apparel → Men’s Apparel → Dress Shirt → Slim Fit, with attributes like color, size, and brand.

The Article Hierarchy, however, aligns with a consumer perspective:
Men’s Dress Shirt → Slim Fit → No Iron → White → Size, catering to how customers search and shop.

Key Considerations

  1. Separate Focus: Merchandise Hierarchy is procurement-centric, while Article Hierarchy is consumer-centric.
  2. Avoid Overlap: Do not attempt to merge requirements into one hierarchy to prevent unnecessary complexity.
  3. Planning and Reporting: Use Article Hierarchy for sales-driven decisions; Merchandise Hierarchy for purchasing and inventory tasks.
  4. Sustainability: Limit levels to optimize performance and maintain historical data accuracy.
  5. Flexibility: Design Article Hierarchies to adapt to evolving consumer behaviors while keeping Merchandise Hierarchy stable.

By clearly distinguishing the roles of Merchandise and Article Hierarchies, retailers can optimize both internal operations and customer-facing processes. This ensures efficient planning, reporting, and an enhanced consumer experience.

entry.title: Developer in 2024 : which is the best way ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm an Abap expert (classic or object etc). I've done 2 upgrade in this position. I know also Fiori free style and a little of Fiori element. 
Now I can influence development approach in several context but I'm a bit confused in what is the good approach to create a Fiori App.

And now you can do : 

for back-end : classic (SEGW), RAP, CAP and also CAP in the cloud
for front-end : Fiori freestyle, Fiori elements, Full-stack with productivity tools, annotations on cds

And I suppose I forgot options. Plus the configuration of the customer : private cloud, on premise... Plus the knowledge of the IT company.

I know I have to progress for CAP but is it the same in back-end and btp.

I'll appreciate any advice.

Christophe

entry.title: Does datasphere work good with ECC or should it be with S4/Hana
entry.content:
Hello

Gurus,

I would like to know that if SAP Datasphere with work fine with ECC 6.0 as far as performance and all the features are concerned or Is it best delivered in when connected with S4/HANA.

We have ECC 6.0 and our roadmap to implement S4 in 2027 but we are trying to do PoC  on Datasphere which is connected with ECC and I am just wondering what are the advantages or pros & cons of datasphere connected with ECC or should we wait for S4 and then implement datasphere.

Thanks for your advice in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP CI iFlow exception as noted in SAP Note 3293244 b...
entry.content: Hi, SivaPO. We do not have an exception sub-process at this time. However, we are analyzing options to do so as from other research I've also done this seems like the 'best practice'. Thanks for the tip!

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeling Extensions & Integration QRC Q1 2024 Release
entry.content:
Hi @Emmanuel1 ,

There are security concerns regarding the export of Data Access Control information from models.  I would suggest creating an Influence item explaining your use-case for doing this https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/884 .

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: Can a custom field be set as mandatory only for New Hire/Rehire process, otherwise optional?
entry.content: We have a new custom field that should be mandatory to fill out during the hire/rehire process, but should not be mandatory for current employees (i.e. when doing a change in job info etc). Can it be set up via a business rule or somehow?

entry.title: Re: API Real Estate Contracts for Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Jeroen, thank you for your feedback. Unfortunately, there is currently only the workaround to create contracts with contract objects (J4) using the 3-step-approach: (1) create contract with contract object, (2) read the contract object from the created object, (3) create conditions using the contract object number. We are aware that this workaround is uncomfortable and try to improve the use of the API. Best regards, Anja

entry.title: Re: Dimension Description Text Options
entry.content: Maybe you just try use this dimension property as dimension in table axis instead of the dimension itself.

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content: in the program that maintains the database table

entry.title: Re: Let's get to know each other!
entry.content:
Hi All,

My name is Walter Westerveld and I'm the Global Value Manager. Within our organisation we are using Process Manager/Process Governance/Collaboration Hub and Process Insights for our 2 running SAP programs. 
We are also using Signavio Transformation Manager to track progress and untangle the large amount of information to our End Users.

Hello,

Kindly refer below links about SLP and SPM setup. It does not cover the specific thing you are looking for, possibly because it is not yet available. You may check if you can use SPM project and have the scores updated by participants.

  • Running Supplier Performance Management Reviews

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI MFA with Microsoft Entra (Part I): Integration with SAP Secure Login Service
entry.content:
Great Blog Martin and Christian, Thank you for sharing in very detailed format. 

I have 2 questions:

1. How to change the CN=<SAP USERID> in SAP Secure client, instead of email attribute. Is there a way to change in SAP Cloud IDP ?

2. Noticed, that CN value is a case sensitive and SAP strongly checks for same exact value, is there anyway to overwrite this ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud SCIM API version 1 and 2 high-level comparison
entry.content:
Dear @tskwin 

So sorry for not replying sooner. You may have resolved this issue by now. I don't know why you received this error. The 400 is a bad request, so it's likely to be something like the wrong tenant URL. 

It would be a slightly advantage to set

csrf.token.path=/api/v1/csrf

as I mentioned in this blog but it won't fix the issue.

Kind regards, Matthew

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
Good information will look into detail for replacement object.

However, see below case where open orders SUM aggregation also doesn't give proper result.

Define view ZCDS1
as select distinct from ekko
inner join ekpo on ekpo.ebeln = ekpo.ebeln
inner join eket on eket.ebeln = ekpo.ebeln and eket.ebelp = ekpo.ebelp
{
key ekko.bsart,
key ekpo.ebeln,
key ekpo.ebelp,
       ekpo.matnr,
       ekpow.werks,
       (eket.menge - eket.wege) as open_qntity
}
WHERE ekpo.loekz = ' '
     and ekpo.elikz = ' '

Define view ZCDS2
as select from ZCDS1
{
key matnr,
sum(open_qntity) as open_qntity_sum
} group by matnr

Program:
From previous fetch, we have combination of matnr,werks stored in ITAB.
document type s_bsart select option on selection screen

select ZCDS1~matnr
           ZCDS2~open_qntity_sum
from ZCDS1
inner join ZCDS2 on ZCDS2~matnr = ZCDS1~matnr
for all entries in @ITAB where ZCDS1~bsart in @s_bsart
                                         and ZCDS1~matnr = @ITAB-matnr
                                         and ZCDS1~werks = @ITAB-WERKS
into table @DATA(lt_open_orders_qty).

Note: changing ZCDS1 and ZCDS2 position in select query doesn't fix issue.

Analysis:
Independently run CDS2 it gives one record against particular matnr and sum value is 144
Independently run CDS1 and manually filter for same matnr and saw it has 6 records having different doc. type (BSART) and different werks..SUM value is 144

both results look ok because filter is not performed against werks and bsart. which will be in program.

now, query in program executed as below and result against same matnr is 144. which is not expected as doc. type and werks filter is passed in where clause of CDS1.
same issue here also (same as stock one). this issue is at multiple places, if one solved all aggregated SUM queries issues will be solved.
this approach is ok or some other approached need to follow here?

entry.title: Re: Italy eInvoice submission to SDI
entry.content:
If the incorrect SDI code is identified, it can be corrected in the master data without canceling the invoice.

However, for the VAT number, if the wrong VAT number was selected in the additional data for the first line item in the accounting document, it must be reviewed carefully. If the VAT number is populated in this field, the invoice must be canceled, as it cannot be changed after posting.

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC - eDocument WS Provider ?
entry.content:
Yes, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) provides standard Web Services (WS) for handling electronic document submission and integration. These services allow external systems or partners to submit invoices and other e-documents directly to SAP DRC, which can then process and forward them to the eDocument cockpit.

Key Features:

  1. Standard Web Services: SAP DRC includes standard APIs (Application Programming Interfaces) or Web Services that support integration with external systems. These services enable automated submission of invoices and other document types.

  2. Integration with External Partners: SAP DRC can be configured to allow external partners to submit invoices directly. This is typically done using SAP's middleware solutions like SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) or SAP Process Orchestration (PO). These tools facilitate the communication between external systems and SAP DRC.

  3. Direct Submission to eDocument Cockpit: Once the invoice is submitted via the Web Service, SAP DRC ensures it is processed and visible in the eDocument Cockpit. From there, users can monitor the status, process errors, or submit the documents to the relevant tax authorities.

Benefits:

  • Streamlined integration for external partners.
  • Reduced manual intervention in document submission.
  • Compliance with local e-invoicing regulations.

If you need more specifics on configuration or supported APIs, SAP documentation (e.g., SAP Help Portal or SAP API Business Hub) provides detailed guidelines.

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi 

thanks, and in SE16 the password remains clear? is there a way to hide it?

entry.title: Re: I created the SAP GUI AI Agent
entry.content: It is an amazing attempt to showcase what is possible

entry.title: Re: Issue with telco accelerator
entry.content:
Hi, I copy the response from SAP. It will be solved in next releases.

"

Dear Customer,

it was confirmed by the Development team that the issue reported by you is in fact a bug. Thank you for bringing the issue to our attention.
The development team responsible for the implementation within b2c-telco-accelerator created an internal code correction ticket CXTMA-8980 "Issue in TmaSubscriptionBaseValidator" and will take care of the bug in the next sprint. Unfortunately no ETA is yet know for the bugfix release.
I will now reroute your case to the DEV team's queue. Please await the updates on the development for the fix."

 

@afernandezq wrote:

Hello,

telco accelerator has the file hybris/bin/modules/b2c-telco-accelerator/b2ctelcocommercewebservicescommons/resources/b2ctelcocommercewebservicescommons-spring.xml. In the next bean they are using an implementation instead of an interface:

 

 

 

<alias name="defaultTmaSubscriptionBaseValidator"
alias="tmaSubscriptionBaseValidator"/>
<bean id="defaultTmaSubscriptionBaseValidator"
class="de.hybris.platform.b2ctelcocommercewebservicescommons.validator.TmaSubscriptionBaseValidator">
<property name="tmaSubscriptionBaseFacade"
ref="tmaSubscriptionBaseFacade"/>
<property name="tmaDefaultCustomerFacade"
ref="defaultTmaCustomerFacade"/>
</bean>

 

 

 

 

 

 

public class TmaSubscriptionBaseValidator implements Validator
{
...
private TmaDefaultCustomerFacade tmaDefaultCustomerFacade;
...
}

 

 

 

It Should be "private TmaCustomerFacade" using an interface instead of an implementation. Does anybody know if it is gping to be solved in next release or how we could request it?.

Thanks.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
the saved passworld can be displayed, but it will show its encrypted value

  • FIEB_PASSWORD_ENCRYPT
  • IM_DECRYPTED_PASSWORD = TEST
  • EX_ENCRYPTED_PASSWORD = } {zyxwvutsrqponmlkjihgfedcba`_^

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content: I guess that it's a bug in this situation: one CDS view containing an aggregate function, and ABAP querying this CDS view with FOR ALL ENTRIES. In classic ABAP, you can't use aggregate functions with FOR ALL ENTRIES. I'm surprised to not find anything in the SAP notes yet. I would expect an ABAP syntax error.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Conversational A.I with SAP Analytics Cloud - Powered by GEN A.I & Intercom
entry.content: Hi All, If the spoiler tag doesn't open please reload and try again :).

entry.title: Data Dictionary for Learning
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

where can we find the most up do date Data Dictionary for SF Learning? 

On this page (Data Dictionary - SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management System | SAP Help Portal ) it says: "You can download the latest Data Dictionary on the SAP Help Portal. You will need to select the Data Dictionary and Database Changes. " However, the Data Dictionary cannot be found there. Also not from what KBA 2326249 says. 

We would appreciate your guidance please.

Many thanks!
BR, Anna

entry.title: Re: Does datasphere work good with ECC or should it be wi...
entry.content:
Datasphere is very much optimised for S/4HANA but it's compatible with ECC. Semantic Onboarding and Datasphere Business Content are all oriented towards SAP S/4HANA and the CDS View architecture.

Datasphere has an ABAP Connector and an ECC Connector which can be used to access data from within an ECC system using a number of different approaches including remote tables.

Datasphere adds tremendous value to your business through improved insights, better decision making and next generation self-serviceability. There's no reason to defer those opportunities until you move to SAP S/4HANA. It's true that you may want to rework some of the data integration when you move to S/4HANA but the effort to optimise those integrations is trivial when compared to the benefits you'll unlock by using Datasphere for the intervening period.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New options for managing Views for filters tables and charts
entry.content:
Hi @Jocelyn_Dart ,

We are trying to setup our Launchpad so that "regular users" cannot create public views, "key users" can create public views (not via adapt UI but via the simple "Public" tick box when saving views) and "super key users" can do it via adapt UI.

I think a new launchpad parameter should be created for this, so there would be 4 options:

- PUBLIC - all users can create public and private users

- PRIVATE - only private views can be saved. Public views can only be created via Adapt UI

- NONE - no views can be saved

- A new one: KEY - regular users can only create private views, key users can create public views

The main reason is that we want to control Public View creation but being forced to do it via Adapt UI is quite cumbersome.  If Key Users can do it via the simple "Public view" tick box in each app directly then it will be much easier. It also means we don't have to open up Adapt UI to as many users.

What do you think?

Thanks,

Jack

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Custom UDF in Message Mapping
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need help creating a Groovy UDF to split a property value (containing a comma-separated string) into multiple values within the same context in SAP PI/PO message mapping.

For example, the property value:
item=000010,000030,000020

I want to extract each value (000010, 000030, 000020) as separate outputs in the same context.

Here’s the Groovy script I wrote:

def void getProperty(String propertyName, MappingContext context, Output output) {
def propertyValue = context.getProperty(propertyName)
if (propertyValue) {
def values = propertyValue.split(",")
values.each { value ->
output.addValue(value.trim())
}
} else {
output.addValue("")
}
}

However, the function doesn’t appear in the "Custom UDF" section. Can someone help identify what I might be doing wrong or suggest improvements to achieve this functionality?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: QA08 Activate despite of Stock is not creating NEW inspection lot for QI stock without lots
entry.content: Hi, You need to check you Plant level Settings for Insp Lot Creation.

entry.title: Re: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List...
entry.content: Did not know this before. Thank you for that information!

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
@Sunilnaidu20201 Hello Sunil, I have shared the legal change with the Developer, once they release it I will post here in the main post.

If you cannot wait for the note´s publication you can update the tables T5UGE and T5UGF following the IRS requirement, as this note just contains manual implementation. 

Kind regards,
Graziela

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
SAP_BASIS Release 750

SAP_ABA Release 750

so, it is ABAP 7.5 release..right? does that make some difference.

hhmm. If we use, SELECT statement directly do SUM and FOR ALL ENTRIES (FAE) and GROUP BY then it gives error. For time being FAE is removed and some hardcoded values passed in WHERE clause even then it won't filter.

If we call alone CDS1 one in program it gives result with filtered value then how to do aggregation? 

Just thinking what is the other way to achieve this aggregation against matnr as single entry in result.

entry.title: Update Credit Exposure after Goods Return delivery
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have encountered a problem related with credit exposure not considering the goods return with reference to a sales order.

The process flow is the following:

- Client creates a sales order and the corresponding outbound delivery with goods issue posting;
- Client realizes there was a mistake and this outbound delivery is completely incorrect;
- Due to the Portuguese Edocument legal requirement, the goods issue posting can't be reversed and the outbound delivery can't be deleted;
- A customer goods return is created to reverse the posted goods issue.

Problem:
- Considering that an invoice was not created, credit exposure still considers the outbound delivery;
- The goods return delivery is not being considered for credit exposure, even though the item category used (RENV) has the "credit active" box checked.

What could be the problem? Is there a way to remove these outbound deliveries from credit exposure or some configuration that could be missing for the goods return delivery?

Thanks in advance,

Best regards.

entry.title: Changing default dropdown value in SAP CRM Web UI
entry.content:
Hi there!

I wanted to change default values which gets populated in the below picture.

Instead of showing (Nicht ausgewählt) i would like show the input field empty.

Is there any way to make that possible?

I tried to debug the component but the table with values of the drop down list for each object (Vorgangsart, Zugeordnet zu, ...) is empty.

I dont know where is the placeholder defined.

 

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Re: Error when deploying Fiori app from VS code -Unexpect...
entry.content: We have SAP_ABA 750 and SAP_UI 754..

entry.title: Re: sap.ui.table.table - Best way to clear table completely and rebind with different set of data ?
entry.content:
Hi,

After you rebind your second set do model refresh,

this.getView().byId("tableID").getModel("tableModel").refresh(true);
this.getView().byId("tableID").getModel("tableModel").updateBindings(true);

entry.title: Problema com envio do workitem para uma lista de usuários
entry.content:
Meu WF está com acoplamento de eventos e de instância realizados. WF está ativo. Tarefa de WF e de workitem ambas com a classificação geral para os usuários habilitados. Configuração da SWU3 OK.

Tenho uma regra de WF que encontra uma lista de usuários.  A tarefa de WF que usa essa regra é disparada, mas sempre desconsidera o primeiro usuário da lista anteriormente obtida.

Alguém sabe como resolver ?

entry.title: Re: Error ".txt is not imported prior to export" when pub...
entry.content: Thanks for the update that helps the community !

entry.title: Re: Error when deploying Fiori app from VS code -Unexpect...
entry.content: Initially I got the certificate error. Then, I used "ignoreCertError: true" in the UI5-deploy.yaml file and got rid of the certification error.

entry.title: Re: ABAP News for SAP BTP ABAP Environment 2411
entry.content:
Hi @lenapadeken 

Thanks for the post. Those are great additions to ABAP.

 I think there's a mistake in this post regarding the READ TABLE + WHERE. The problem is that the code snippet is showing LOOP +  WHERE:

This post:

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Error when deploying Fiori app from VS code -Unexpect...
entry.content:
https://www.npmjs.com/package/nwabap-ui5uploader

your server is too old, probably not supported by fiori tool regarding deployment

use that node js module to do the deployment

entry.title: Re: Financial Accounting 4 Advanced Execution Service Scenario in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Kai,

First: this is just an option to provide a costing sheet on the service order item. you cyn control with derivation tool. The costing sheet derived from PM order as before,fits better to the processes running on the PM order. thus we do not inherit.

In the standard process there are revenues posted on the service order item. One could apply negative surcharges on the revenue amount to cover costs for e.g. expected commisions or insurance.
And you can post manual costs on the service order item.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors LMS: 1H 2023 Release Highlights
entry.content:
@nageshpolu @lauragarbi It is December 12th, 2024 - Hello Nagesh and Laura

Our company has recently expressed interest in implementing in 'SAP SuccessFactors Learning' #6 above which is: 'Receive Reminders of Learning Assignments in Microsoft Teams'.

Is there any 'SAP SuccessFactors Learning' KBA etc. or instructions on how to go about doing this integration of 'SAP SuccessFactors Learning' with Microsoft Teams, especially in regards specifically to 'Receive Reminders of Learning Assignments in Microsoft Teams'.

This is something that became available in 2023-1H-LMS release, and we are now sitting in the tail end of 2024, going into 2025 and my company would like to implement this, so I am hoping someone from SAP or the Community can point me in the right direction for the steps to do this.

I found an old Reference Number (WRK-233) on the What's New Viewer for the Release, but I am now not able to find anything regarding this topic.

Any help in providing me the instructions, or pointing me to where I can find them would be appreciated.

Thank you in advance - Mike Wright

We want to make sure that only certain people can edit specific customer (sales) partner functions.
Not all of them!

is this possible? And if yes, how?

Best regards,
Hans

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi @ChandraV @Matt_Fraser @graziela @CarlosAccorsi 

We are in SAP HR 604 and recently upgraded support stacks from J8 to L0. During this upgrade we kept the TUB level at 147 Cyclic K2.

Now when we go to PUOC_10 transaction code in production, payment number are missing for some pay period that has retro. Please do let me know why this is happening and is there a corresponding note that resolves this issue.

entry.title: Re: cost center missing in financial statements report (f...
entry.content:
Hi Krishna,

The reason it is not showing the 'Cost Center' in the financial statement report is because this report is expected to show only Balance sheet and Profit and Loss details.

It is the expected system architecture and in addition, it does not show both the 'Cost Center and Project Cost Structure' details in the  financial statement report.

Best Regards,

Abarna

entry.title: Configuring SAP Cloud Connector to send data to Splunk enterprise
entry.content: Is it possible to send data to splunk hec endpoint via cloud connector?
